reviews.review_description: THERE REALLY SHOULD BE A CAMERA BUTTON TO SWITCH FROM WATCHING THE CAR ON THE TRACK TO A POV OF ME IN THE CAR ACTUALLY DRIVING THE TRACK. MAY WANNA LOOK INTO. AND. ALLOW GHOST CARS TO RIDE ALONG US IN SINGLE PLAYER OTHER THEN THAT GREAT CONCEPT
Is no tuturial

Have had this title for a few months and can say that this is the kind of game that mixed reality is made for. If you ever played with slot cars as a kid (or big kid) then don't wait on getting this one, nice to see it's an affordable price too.
The track designer is great and there's already a lot of user designed tracks, I expect we will see a lot more now that it's on Horizon+
Looking forward to the upcoming update but amongst other things I'd like to see:
A search and alphanumeric sorting facility in the track selection menu.
The ability to also be able remotely place a car on the track without having to reach manually to place it down (this would also allow it to be more accessible for someone who is disabled in a chair). Still allow manual placing of the car though.
Alpha transparent shadows of track items showing on my floor (at present the shadows only work on the graphics of the game, not the passthrough camera view, proper shadows would increase immersion).
Better match making.
Click and release palm trigger to grab and hold the controller, rather than needing to hold the trigger down the entire time which adds fatigue.

Well done to the developer, it's a great app.
I love it but am begging to be able to play offline. Many times my power and Internet go out and it makes this otherwise GREAT app completely useless which is unfortunate.

This WOULD be a 5 star, sick game, but certain turns that aren’t colossal crash my car. I know it’s “realistic” but PLEASE add a setting to make all turns that are possible just not crash your car, or one that makes your car not crash.. PLEASE!!! I AM BEGGING..

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and feedback raining111. The car physics are something we have spent a great deal of time perfecting. There is a skill to getting round tracks in the fastest time making for real competition, much like any form of racing. Adding a zero crash mechanic isn't something we have considered as it would go against the sprit of racing. Hopefully you stick at it and work out those tricky corners 😁

reviews.review_description: Not everyone has more than one VR headset in their home. The game is spot on and it's fun building but why no AI generated opponent to race against? Really should be. 5 stars if you add that.

developer_response.body: So glad you're enjoying the game and we really appreciate the positive review. A great suggestion that we have, and will, continue to look into.

reviews.review_description: Competing other players times on the tracks they built, makes it really fun.and replayable. Not sure if there is such a feature already implemented, but a notification would be awesome if your place on a track has been changed since the last login (because someone beat your time)

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review. Great to hear you're enjoying the game and laying down some quick lap times it seems. Feedback is always really helpful when we're looking to further improve the game, we really appreciate it.

reviews.review_description: i would like to play offline mode cause i don t have internet access all time

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback Rach18sep. The good news is that the game can be played offline and without an internet connection. Building, racing and saving tracks are fully supported whilst you are offline. Leaderboards, user generated content and multiplayer services are the only elements you can't do offline as these require a connection to the server. You can also download and save user generated tracks to your headset locally when you have an Internet connection and enjoy these offline when you are restricted.

We hope you enjoy the game, but if you encounter any issues at all, please don't hesitate to reach out via the discord or by emailing slotcarvr@gmail.com

All the very best
Slot car vr team

reviews.review_description:
Recently I'd been thinking about getting a slot car racing set but I hesitated
 because of the cost and my lack of space. This app solved all my slot car problems. It's absolutely incredible. I'm just a casual racer and can't speak for the aficionados, but for someone like me this app is perfect. I hope that someone will someday make something like this for lovers of train sets.

developer_response.body: We're really pleased you're enjoying the game and thank you so much for the review. We are continually improving the game and will be releasing some further updates soon 😁. Keep on racing 🏎️

reviews.review_description:
Slot Car VR is exactly what you’d hope for as a fan of classic slot car racing. On the Quest 3, the game truly shines: crisp visuals, smooth performance, and an impressive sense of scale make you feel like you're right there at the track.
The controls are intuitive yet challenging—in true slot car fashion, it’s all about timing and precision. One of the standout features is the ability to place and build tracks directly in your own space, creating a unique blend of nostalgic toy racing and modern VR technology.
The sound design and small details, like the characteristic hum of the cars, add a lot to the immersion. Whether you play for a few quick races or longer sessions, it stays consistently fun and engaging.
Conclusion:
Slot Car VR is a standout title on the Quest 3 and a must-play for racing and model enthusiasts. Simple, creative, and surprisingly addictive.
Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
A comprehensive review and five star rating, couldn't have put it better ourselves. Thank you so much for the support and we hope you continue to enjoy the game.

Thanks again 
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: This game is a fairly accurate reproduction of Scalextric in digital form and such fun to play but for whatever reason the online multiplayer feature has never worked for me, no matter what track or time if day I'm playing it doesn't want to know. Even after deleting and reinstalling I have no luck, and that's so frustrating as I'd love the opportunity to demonstrate to others just how useless I am on this game.

developer_response.body:
We're really pleased you're enjoying the game and we appreciate the positive review.

The code 32760 you are experiencing is a multiplayer log indicating you have been unable to join a public session. This code could be caused by one of two reasons:

- You are not connected to the Internet
- There are no available public sessions to join at that time

Multiplayer sessions can be private or public and will only be available if other users have hosted public sessions and their game instances are not already full. If you haven't already tried, hosting a public session yourself would allow others to join for building and racing online. We also suggest joining the discord to find other players who are looking to compete.

We hope you continue to enjoy the game and get to demonstrate those racing skills soon!

reviews.review_description: This game offers an amazing simulation of the slot car experience. However, I’m writing this review to quickly note that the developers care about the game and their community. You will find in the Review section that the Developers replied to the customer reviews, their complaints and questions, and took the time to write a thoughtful response. Yes, that’s good business practice but you’d be surprised how few development teams take the time to engage with their users on this level. And you will find a similar care and attention to game itself. One notable example is the very snappy and intuitive build mode for the game. The act of laying tracks and manipulating these objects in that mixed-reality space is just magic. The feedback and precision is impressive and sold me on the game. Frankly, this team might consider a future project where MR building and simulation is the focus of the game. Congratulations, this is a real achievement.

developer_response.body:
Wow! You've put a smile on all of our faces, comments like this mean the absolute world to us. Slot car vr is our second VR title and we are really proud of what we have been able to achieve. In particular, we spent so much time early on in development to bring the building tools to life in a way that's not just drag and drop but intuitive and makes full use of mixed reality. Significantly more time spent of developing and refining, but hearing feedback like this, makes it all worth it! 

Thank you again and we really hope you continue to enjoy the game 🏎️

P.s. Great suggestion re future projects... 😀

reviews.review_description: I just got it today and it’s lit. I love the ￼aspect of u being able to play with friends and it be a free form game. It is actually addictive to play highly recommended buying this game

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review. Hope you get many more hours of enjoyment building and racing with friends.

reviews.review_description: Absolutely amazing, plays well and is  fantastic value for money, i scrolled through at least 3000 tracks before giving up trying to see how many there are, thats more than enough tracks to keep you happy,  its so easy to use and build our own tracks and upload them for others , I promise you you are gonna love this.  what a gem what a find and what a steal, this restored mynfaith in humanity, most are greedy n give youncrap, not this creator, thank you so much for your generosity. You deserve every bit of success.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review and 5 ⭐. So glad you're enjoying the game and we were able to restore your faith in humanity 😅. Our success comes from positive reviews and recommendations, so this means a lot!

Keep racing 🏎️

reviews.review_description: Some kid ruined my build and I can’t put it in the position I want to put it at and I NEED to be able to group everything so I can put it in a new position so I can work on my track

developer_response.body: Hi fizh, you can move the track using the joysticks or by grabbing the track offset tool from the menu. Movement of tracks is local, so even when building with someone else, they can't impact where you see your track. If you have any further queries at all, please feel free to drop us an email slotcarvr@gmail.com or join the discord.

reviews.review_description:
Has really good potential and if you enjoyed the old days of TCR or Scaleltric etc then you will love it.
For developers: it is crying out for a best lap ghost car for single player (crucial).
Also instead of having to adjust the camera to suit the track and room (often a bit time consuming) could it have an "auto far view'  button or similar to give an imediate better viewing point from which to then adjust?
Finally. There should be a 2 second penalty added to your timer when the car flips off. That would encourage more skillful approach.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the positive review and feedback. We listen to all of our players and try to take on as much as we can when developing future updates. We'd love to have you join the discord and hear any additional suggestions you have. Keep racing and we can't wait to share new updates with you and the community soon.

reviews.review_description: What a fun game. Reminds me of the Christmas I got a Scaletrix racing set! Really enjoyable. The mixed reality makes it even better!

developer_response.body: So glad to hear this, it was exactly the nostalgia we were going for when creating the game. Thank you so much for the review and we hope you get many more hours of enjoyment from it.

reviews.review_description:
Whenever I load into the game and spawn my track, it goes down and it won’t stop going down
I don’t know what’s happening 
￼

developer_response.body:
Really sorry to hear you're having issues. This isn't something we've come across before, or been made aware of for other players. Please reach out via the discord or alternatively send us an email - slotcarvr@gmail.com and we can troubleshoot the problem.

Many thanks
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: What a game for the price!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review. We've got more updates coming soon to make the game even better.

reviews.review_title: 🔥Fun vr game five from me too y’all 🔥
reviews.review_description: One of my fav vr games as I speak and it’s relaxing and fun one the greatest fun ever ask me makes me feel like a little kid 🧒 again why lie thanks great ￼ purchase for me

developer_response.body: We're so pleased you're enjoying the game and it's bringing that nostalgia hit. Thank you very much for the review and look forward to sharing new updates with you soon.

reviews.review_description: After women’s figuring out how it all works as for single player its very good but multiplayer seems strange as I’ve not yet managed to to find anyone to play with and this game lends itself to a co-op play style and also could you have a lap counter and timer its all week and good building tracks but if you don’t have a lap counter how do you know who has won?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review and the feedback. Multiplayer can be accessed in multiple different ways. Joining public sessions will depend on other user being available at the same time. Joining the discord can help find other users to play with if you aren't able to find other users when online. 

Regarding the lap counter and timer, this is displayed on the start line and on the UI panel in your non dominant hand. You will see this counting up when you are racing a challenge on an online track, or when you set up a race in the game modes section. If you're having any issues with this, please feel free to reach out via the discord.

We hope you keep enjoying the game and we can turn that rating into a 4 or 5 star review.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: There's so much to do In this game. It really brings the excitement of slotcar racing without costing a fortune! I built a huge track and put lots of love and care into each placement of each piece of track, decoration, and snowman (yes, I said snowman). Then I got on my computer and looked up how much it would have cost. It would have cost around $3000 usd to make this track!!! But I did it and many other for 10!!! Definitely with the money.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review 😁. We've got even more in store for the game coming very soon too! So glad you're enjoying the game and looking forward to see and race on the tracks you've built.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game! 2 things for the dev’s that would make it perfect for me:

1) The ability to have more cars available and maybe include motorcycles 

2) since I seldom (if ever) play multiplayer games, I would love the ability to race against a computer controlled (bot) opponent.

developer_response.body:
So glad you're enjoying the game. You'll be pleased to know we've added two new vehicles since and have plenty more to come. Really appreciate the feedback and thank you again for the review.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: I've had electric slot car race sets since I was a kid. I'm a senior now and love this game which brings back so many fond memories of getting my butt kicked by my older brother. But, when he and I play multiplayer I always beat him by laps. His car does not seem to go near as fast as mine. Is this a game issue or maybe related to his controller? We've checked everything and can't seem to remedy this discretion.

developer_response.body:
Competition between siblings is where it's at! There shouldn't be any difference between the car speeds when racing, only skill. So hopefully it's a case, the tables have turned and now you're the one on top. However if you think you are experiencing issues, please get in touch via our discord or you can send an email to slotcarvr@gmail.com

Thanks again and I hope that winning streak continues. 

Slot car vr team

reviews.review_title: This app is a Sparkling Gem.
reviews.review_description:
If you ever had a 1/32nd scale slot car set, it hits your nostalgic bone in a true way.
If you're into building amazing track layouts and sharing them with the community, this app has all the tools you could hope for.
If you have a couple of headsets (even if they are on the same account) and you want to share the experience with your kid, you can play mixed reality in same room.
Great job Devs.
A tremendous bargain for $10.00

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review rsloss. That nostalgic trip is exactly what we were going for with the game. And you're right, $10 might buy you one or two pieces of physical track, we have unlimited! Thanks again and looking forward to see what tracks you create with the new updates we have coming very soon

reviews.review_description:
This would have blown my mind when I was a kid, it kind of still does now I'm an adult haha. 
There's a lot of track pieces and decorations to build your own track with and you can upload and play tracks other people have made. You can compete to beat the times on each track and also has multiplayer racing which is fantastic. I love the synthwave soundtrack too, it adds to the nostalgia. 

A lot of fun and kind of a hidden gem of a Mixed Reality game in my opinion because its a very good showcase for the tech.

I do think adding AI opponents to race against in single player would be a nice touch as a few other reviews mentioned.

developer_response.body: It's reviews like this that keep our small team going. Thank you so much for the love and hopefully we can blow your mind even further. We've got lots more to add coming soon. If you've got any other suggestions, we'd love to have you on the discord community.

reviews.review_description: Don't get me wrong, this is a fun game.  However,  the nostalgia wears off if you're not a multi-player person.  As one review said, having the ability to race the AI offline would raise this game to the next level.  Also, the ability to customize color on different parts of the cars would be nice.  Being able to stretch a track any distance would be nice along woth duplicating parts of the track.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and your feedback. We have plenty of updates in store for the game so watch this space. If you have any additional points, we'd love to hear them on our discord community.

reviews.review_description: This Is the type of game I've been looking for to waste away hours when I've got the time to play around on. Loved slot racing since I was a kid and love the track design where I can sink hours into using shapes to create things over my upcoming weeks off. 4 stars just cause I think there's so many more props and things that can be added to the game to perfect it. Maybe for multiplayer, a lobby menu so if lobbies are up you can see lists with the host names etc. Hopefully this sees updates cause if I start to see even little updates trickle in I will bump it up to 5 star as that's what people will need to keep interested in this type of game, and give them more ways to get creative with the tracks. Adding assets shouldn't be hard.

developer_response.body: So glad you're enjoying the game. You'll be pleased to know those trickle of updates are in motion. Lots of new additions and props coming your way soon 😁. Hopefully we can get the extra star bump. Enjoy and can't wait for you to see what we have coming next.

reviews.review_description: Didn't know how much I enjoyed playing slot cars...dev a wonderful game and at a nice price!! Please a few more cars maybe trucks

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review. You may see we've snuck a truck in there recently 😎! Plenty more where that came from. New updates are coming very soon. Keep building and racing

reviews.review_title: This is an awesome game, but
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend have played this game a lot recently and he pointed out that this game would be great if we could scan cars. Possibly by you guys using the meta cameras and scanning cars that players can hold up in-front-of the cameras and the game could scan them to be used in game.    Thank you for making this game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review. Great to hear you're playing it alot and making full use of multiplayer. 

Scanning cars would be awesome! Unfortunately we're not there yet with the tech, but who knows further down line. In the meantime, we will be releasing some new cars very shortly 😁. 

Hope you keep enjoying the game and if you have any other suggestions or feedback, we'd love you to join the Discord community to share your thoughts. 

Many thanks Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
The game is a great foundation to continue developing it.  

From here, I would like to encourage the developers to keep working on the game and thank them for its creation by giving it 5 stars.  

I would love it if they added an option to reduce the magnet effect of the cars and allowed configuring the braking level.  


On another note, a rally-style competition system would be amazing. Multiple stages, several runs, and calculating the total time without the possibility of practicing until the day of the competition.

Keep pushing! Thanks

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review. We really appreciate the support. We're committed to updating the game further, working on new and improved features with the help of all of our amazing community.

There are some great suggestions here which we will absolutely be taking on board.

Thanks again and we can't wait to share new features with you soon.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_title: Absolutely a must for any slot car lover
reviews.review_description: It is a real joy to play in VR to slot car with this APP

developer_response.body: 😍 So glad you're enjoying it. Can't wait to share the new updates we have coming soon.

reviews.review_description: This app took me back to Christmas morning, when I opened a track racing set.  A figure 8 with a lap counter and chicane.  This was long before consoles and home computers, pocket calculates hadn't even been invented yet.  Once again I could feel the thrill of trying to keep my car on the track.  The fact you have unlimited track and accessories  just makes my heart jump for joy.  Naturally my car has to be British Racing Green.  I don't know yet if you can turn on the lights like you could the old toy car models.  If not maybe something to think about??? Just one thing no I am not going to wear shorts again.

developer_response.body: Such a wholesome review! So happy you're enjoying the game and it's bringing back nostalgic memories. I had so much joy with these as a kid too and we really wanted to capture that excitement again with Slot Car VR. Re the lights on cars... I think that's one for the idea board. Thanks again and hope you keep enjoying the game. We're certainly not finished with it and will be looking to grow content and features with support from the community.

reviews.review_description:
This is an easy buy 
Graphics mid
Sound sounds good
Controls no complaints 
Fun pretty fun
Replay ability moderate to high
 It's a fun game, and I can't wait for an update. The devs seem vocal and sound committed to the suggestions by the people. I have high hopes for the future of this game with a few updates/little tweaks. I noticed you guys snuck some new cars in. Caught ya! Buy the game and see you guys on the leader boards!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review Sean. We are absolutely committed to the game and welcome all feedback good and bad to help development further.

So glad you're enjoying it so far and hopefully with the future updates we can turn that 4🌟 into a 5 😁.

You caught us! There's plenty more where they came from 🚗

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
I saw this and thought I would give it a go at 6 quid. Well must say it was easy to build the track and to see it floating in my living room was pretty awesome. 
Learning to build it was quick and easy although instructions were a bit vague ( or I didn't read them properly) 
So I built a circuit chucked in a loop de loop and a few hair pins added some fences and gave it a go.  
Okay so the cars not quite the same as the real thing but go too fast and you are off track! Only disappointing bit was the cars don't fall off if you stop on a loop de loop like they would on a real slot racer. 

I can see me spending hours now track building and adding buildings and fences every where. 

This is a great little game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review. Love to hear the nostalgia flooding back and the hours of fun building and racing. We're busy working on future updates so watch this space 😁.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_title: Your youth brought back to you.
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy this game.  It's immediately brought me back to my childhood back in the 1960s & 1970s. I'm amazed at how much personal creativity can be used to create not only the tracks but also the surroundings to the track.  I love this game and even my wife was amazed by it. We were wondering if I have a friend play with me on a track I created, would they also see inside my home?  I know in the video I recorded everyone can see my Livingroom, but if we are racing one another do they see my house or do they see the inside of their house? 

The things I would add/change are premade curved pieces like the other premade, because getting the curve just right can be difficult.  With a premade curve section, it would make it easier.   
I would also make it that the premade ground sections can be enlarged to the exact size needed. Like you do on a computer when you want to enlarge a photo with a few simple hand movements.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review. It's incredibly wholesome to hear reviews like this.

We actually found your YT video a couple of days ago 👍 some great track building. As for the passthrough comment when in multiplayer - you'll be pleased to know no-one would see your room when you share a track or upload a track to online tracks in the game. Anyone joining you remotely would see your virtual track only and have the ability to position it in their home in the most optimal position.

There are a number of pre made curved track pieces, you should simply pull out to the sides of a piece of track in the game. You can also created custom track joining pieces by linking two seperate pieces of track together.

Some other great suggestions in there and something we will absolutely give some thought to.

Really happy you and your wife are enjoying the game and thank you again for really the review. It really helps us out to get feedback on the game and aid further development.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_title: A great start. Needs an expert mode
reviews.review_description: I've been begging for a Scalextric VR game for a long time and this one ticks many boxes. The circuit editor is exactly how it should be: you can put together a circuit in a matter of minutes and the parts can deform to fit together as if they were real plastic track parts. The main thing I'm missing as of now is the physics. Real slot car racing is million times harder than this game. If you pressed the trigger fully on a real slot car game the car would go off-track at the first turn, here it will take a while for it to gain enough speed and crash. I think this needs some tweaking, otherwise races won't be as competitive and fun as they could be. I'm happy to have slower cars that will remain on the track no matter what, or perhaps an easy mode for little children, I don't mind. But we also need an expert mode or an expert car, that requires precise timing and control of the trigger.

developer_response.body:
This is great to hear Jadranko, the track building element was something we spent a significant amount of time perfecting and we're so glad to hear you're enjoying it. Re driving mechanics, we will be looking to bring further improvements to this in the foreseeable. We'd love to have you join the discord community to help provide further feedback on these points if you're not there already 😁.

Thanks again
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE QUESTION FOR DEVs: can you PLEASE add motorbikes in the future. 

So we got 2x Quest 3 for christmas (lucky I know) and this is hands down the best fun had in years. We have a garage full of physical slot car box sets etc but dont have the room to keep setup/packing up. This game elevates those issues and doesnt matter how big the tracks are. The mechanics are super easy to build, the graphics are great and the mixed reality works a treat. No bugs as yet found and the multiplayer is excellent. Once we got the hang of setting the same room boundary and correct position of our anchor the co-locate feature was brilliant. This game is a MUST BUY for slot car fans and anyone else who is tired of FPS boring games. It's on sale over Christmas too so even better...go buy it! 

- question for the Devs: is there a way you can turn off avatars as rather see my son rather than an animated avatar in co locate mode, can this be done?

UPDATE: Got a message off the Devs to turn off avatars, awesome. Showed my 70nyear old mum this too and she loved it. So simple yet so much freakin fun! Be cool if you added light dimming and lights on cars like the old slot car racing sets. Be good also if you added cross over track segments too.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this Jonsey. We're delighted to hear you're having such a great time with the game and making the most of multiplayer 😁. You'll be pleased to know there is a way to toggle off avatars in the multiplayer menu, it is a button next to the mute button which should toggle avatars on and off. We will be imemtimg an automatic switching of avatars when in local multiplayer soon, so this method should only be temporary. If you have any further questions or suggestions, we'd love to have you join the discord.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
This introduced me to slot cars. I didn’t grow up with it but now I own a real set and am slowly collecting cars.

I thought it would be boring after a while with one throttle trigger but slowly I got the hang of it and I can start to enjoy how it’s skill based. Should have an added turbo mode for one of the face buttons A or B. 

It needs some single player / first party track packs and some progression / career type mode for people like me who don’t have people to play multiplayer with and to introduce different mechanics and objectives.

Ghost records, AI to race against, and different cars with different physics for different styles of play.

Formula, cars that turn and drift, etc.

developer_response.body:
That is music to our ears. Thank you so much for sharing.

Really great feedback and a number of points raised are on our radar for future updates to the game, so watch this space 😊. So glad you're enjoying the game and slot car racing as a whole.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
I love the race mechanics of this game.  Actually feels like I'm racing a real slot car track.  Bravo!

I'm very excited about the building option but the mechanics are a bit cumbersome.

Building the track is pretty straightforward, once you figure it out.  Couldn't find the turn pieces until I realized you literally draw the piece how you want it shaped.  

I wish there was an imaginary plane that the scenery pieces could snap into place.  Very difficult to line up the track and creating a "floor" underneath.   I actually loaded up a track made by another user and deleted everything but the base they created.  Might be nice to have a few options for starting points already in the game.  I'm not sure I'm explaining myself very well, hopefully this will make sense once you build for a while.

Overall an awesome experience for anyone who's a fan of slot cars, but doesn't have the space in their house. I'm going to build a track right now!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the great review. All really helpful feedback and we really appreciate your comments. 

There were many decisions made when creating the game re building and a reason to steer away from grid based building is that it prevents players from building in line with their real world spaces and objects. That being said, all feedback is incredibly helpful to us when continuing to add to the game so please do keep them coming. We'd love to hear more, so please do join the discord to get involved in detailed feedback and discussions.

One last point, hopefully you have found the terrain tools in the build menu. These should help to build up an initial scene quickly.

Can't wait to see what you build in the game.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: I can't save my maps that i make that is sad because i spend hours working on them just to be deleted

developer_response.body:
Hi XDTitan, we're really sorry to hear that. It's not something we've heard before so would really welcome you reaching out to us either via our discord or via email (slotcarvr@gmail.com) so we can help assist you and understand what might be happening.

Many thanks
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
Takes me back a few yrs lol brilliant.
Like to have a base to build on like we did back then and maybe the ability to shrink the track in some way ie longer track smaller area needed.

developer_response.body:
So glad to bring back the nostalgia for you. Really pleased you're enjoying it.

Thank you for suggestions, we will take this on board. If not already, please do join the discord community to share any further suggestions or comments for the game.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
BLUF: Buy the game

I own a flea market, and try to collect track pieces and cars.  When I find these pieces I'm lucky if they are clean and ready to go.  I find I spend a lot of time and money cleaning and repairing.  With this game, I can immediately build a working track, or download someone elses. It doesn't take an inch of space in my room, and is not in the way when I am finished.  This game is perfect on so many levels.  Leaderbords on other people's tracks was a great add.  Only thing I would ask is for more car options.  Thank you for this game.  Thank you for this experience!

developer_response.body:
What a great review. So happy to hear you're having so much fun with the game and able to get stuck in straight away without all the issues with traditional slot car racing. We are busy dreaming up new car designs so watch this space 😁.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: this game is great. Be nice to have a change over lane piece put in the build?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review 😁.

So happy you're enjoying the game. 

This has been suggested by many other players and is something we are looking into for future releases so watch this space.

reviews.review_description:
Slot Car VR: A Nostalgic Racing Adventure Reimagined for the Meta Quest

Overview
Slot Car VR masterfully blends the nostalgic joy of slot car racing with the immersive capabilities of virtual reality, creating a unique and engaging experience. Designed for Meta Quest, this game brings miniature tracks and cars to life, offering thrilling races, customizable setups, and a vibrant community for racing enthusiasts.

Gameplay and Features
Slot Car VR captures the essence of classic slot car racing, allowing players to control scaled-down cars on intricate tracks. The intuitive controls and physics-based mechanics create an authentic feel, while the game adds modern twists:
	•	Track Customization: Design and share your own tracks, letting creativity take the wheel.
	•	Multiplayer Mode: Compete with friends or other players online, bringing friendly rivalry to the forefront.
	•	Scenic Environments: Race through a variety of beautifully rendered settings, from futuristic cities to countryside backdrops.
	•	Car Upgrades: Unlock and enhance cars with unique parts, balancing speed, handling, and style.

Visuals and Audio
The game excels in delivering visually detailed tracks and environments, with cars that feel real enough to touch. The sound design, from the hum of the motors to the cheers of the crowd, immerses you in the race, making every lap feel exhilarating.

Why It Stands Out
Slot Car VR shines as a celebration of a beloved pastime, modernized for VR. Its combination of easy-to-learn mechanics, creative freedom, and competitive play makes it a must-try for both VR enthusiasts and slot car fans. Whether you’re reliving childhood memories or discovering slot cars for the first time, this game promises endless fun and excitement.

Verdict
Slot Car VR for Meta Quest is a polished gem, offering the perfect balance of nostalgia and innovation. It’s an easy recommendation for those looking to add a fresh and thrilling experience to their VR library.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much. A really detailed review which is really great to see. Glad you're enjoying the game and can't wait to share new updates soon.

reviews.review_description: Only played a bit so far but lots of fun. I would love a cross over track to use so cars can switch easily between inside and outside lanes. Always great fun racing to a cross over! Lovely game looking forward to seeing it develop further.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review Guitarfink. We've got lots of updates in the pipeline so watch this space 😁.

reviews.review_description: Have spent a couple hours now building tracks all through my house. Perfect game to play over the holidays and relive those childhood memories of playing with my slot cars on winter break! Highly recommended

developer_response.body:
What a lovely review. So glad to hear you're enjoying the game and it's evoking those nostalgic feelings 😁. Looking forward to share further updates with you and the community soon.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: I’ve wanted to get a slot car set but they are too expensive, this is as close as possible for a fraction of the cost. Build your own or download others work it’s all included.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review Sean. A fraction of the cost and unlimited track to work with! Compared to popular real branded sets, Slot Car VR costs the same, if not less that just one piece of straight track! So glad you're enjoying the game and not breaking the bank to experience it 😁.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: I purchased this for my Quest 3,  The control console is stuck to the floor and wont move.  How does a guy get support!

developer_response.body:
Hi Bimmer, sorry to hear you are experiencing issues. The best way to seek support is via the discord: https://discord.gg/xFsRf59N 
or alternatively please send an email to slotcarvr@gmail.com and we will help with troubleshooting.

Thanks
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_title: Kick off to a great game.
reviews.review_description:
A lot of thought and effort has been put into the game and it shows. Very immersive and gives you that child like feel and excitement creating tracks that you could only imagine and to bring to “reality”.  I’m excited to see direction the vision is taken.  

It would be nice to see a starting like with workings lights for better race starts. Pair that with sum sort of mechanical gate or somthing to prevent early start. 

When building I would be nice if you could also control the track direction with the analog to fine tune the intended direction. 

When moving the track around it would be nice to be able to control that with the analog as well so off making a big track it is possible to do so with space.

Again a wonderful game and excited for the future progress.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review Richey. Some great suggestions and ones we will take on board for future updates. Really appreciate it 😁

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_title: Good Game but can be better 😉
reviews.review_description:
I Like this Game as I am already playing with Carrera Hardware für years 🏎️💨 I would appreciate to see the following features with one of the next updates:

- Disable Function for the Speed Shadows
- Ghost Cars for more challenges when playing allone 
- Switch Rails as known from Carrera Digital

developer_response.body:
Hi Matrix. Thank you very much for the review. We fully agree! We are receiving lots of fantastic feedback and ideas from players so please keep them coming. We've noted all these points down and they will be added to our list. If you have any further thoughts please do let us know. The best place is via the discord https://discord.gg/xYDYvuwQPK

Keep racing and hopefully we can turn that 4 stars into a 5 with future updates to the game.

Many thanks
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: Hours of creative fun. Could do with more sceenery options. A train set game like this would be mad

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! We've been blown away with what everyone is building and the race times being posted. You'll be pleased to know we are currently working on more terrain and prop pieces as we speak. Not quite trains, but there may be a special winter update soon ❄️😏.

reviews.review_title: Nice game for a newbie like me
reviews.review_description: This game has a pretty short learning curve which is great for me. Lots of fun.  I do find it clumsy to hold both triggers on the Quest 3 controller in order to maintain the virtual slot controller. If I let go of the middle finger trigger I loose it and have to go get it from the menu list in my left hand. Is there a way around this?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review Radioman. So glad to hear you're enjoying the game and it's user friendly for those just starting out with VR/MR. We wanted the controller to act essentially like a controller in real life where if you let go of it, it would drop from your hands. That being said, we are considering alternative methods for muchinger play sessions. We haveogged this on our developer suggestions and will be looking at possible alternatives. If not already, we'd love to have you join the discord community to provide any further feedback you might have.

We hope you continue to enjoy the game and can't wait to share further updates.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_title: The game is just what I wanted
reviews.review_description: My dad introduced me to slot car and I’ve played it a few times but it was always put away and it made to much noise in a working house this game feels just like when I would play and the best part is I can play it without any worries that the car will break or having to put it back on and making the track is simple and fast I can’t wait to show my dad this game and it won’t make him motion sick👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review. It is all brilliant to hear! Like many other reviews and feedback received, this was exactly what we wanted to achieve with the game, so it's fantastic to hear you're getting on with it so well. Really hope your dad enjoys the game too 😁.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description:
Like lots of reviewers I too had Scalextric when I was younger. This would be an easy five stars if the physics was more realistic. 

The track building is great, graphics fine.
 
Physics is terrible which is a real shame. 
First of all it is possible to stop in the middle of a loop, upside down. No gravity effects. 
Most importantly for me, whether or not the car crashes or comes off the track is a little arbitrary, corners where irl it should come off it doesn't, and vice versa. 
For me the only way I'd enjoy this properly is if it simulated the real thing accurately.

developer_response.body:
Hi Chuffstix, thank you very much for the review. It's so helpful to hear feedback like this. Driving mechanics are something we are looking into for a number of players as there seems to be a divide between ultra realistic and the current physics which allows for not falling off during loops. We'd love to have you join the discord and provide any more specific feedback on this.

Many thanks
Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: Hi !!! I like so much your game but i have to say two details that i would like see in the future. 1.- Add the option of a Virtual Room where we can build our tracks and 2.- Get Better the interface of the other players tracks, cause it's anoying delete all the track to go out of that section. Well to finish Congratulations for you great game

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the review JapDesign. So glad you're enjoying the game. Suggestion 1 is something we are actively thinking about at the moment following some other feedback from users in the discord, so hooefully this is something we can incorporate.

Suggestion 2 can actually be dealt with via the UI. You can clear any track completely and start a fresh by going to to the save/load menu and holding down the button labelled "clear track". Hope that helps 😁.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: The graphics are great, and it's fun to play with kids. It would be even better if there was multilingual support, such as Simplified Chinese and Traditional Chinese. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review and we're delighted you're enjoying the game. Translations are on our road map for development so watch this space 🏎️

reviews.review_description: I love TRACK CRAFT...BUT...THIS is what I hoped Track Craft would be!....CONGRATS developer's, you NAILED IT!

developer_response.body: Wow! That is an incredible review to receive. The whole team are still grinning with these kind words. We're so happy you're enjoying the game and we can't wait to share what we have in store with future updates 🏎️

reviews.review_description: I love it so far, that beeing said, we need more of everything. Assets like Skyscrapers to make City Courses, Pit Stops, changing Lanes And definitely more Car Models and the Option to make Liveries and Decals for them. Do it, NOW. 😁

developer_response.body:
We hear you! 😁. Some new cars coming soon and the other elements mentioned are all great suggestions. We're busy working on future updates so watch this space. If not already, head over to our discord to join the community and let us know more of what you want to see in the game. Would love to have you there.

Slot Car VR team

reviews.review_description: Just buy it.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review Blake. So glad you're enjoying the game 🏎️
